headline: Should Investors Buy Knight-Swift Stock Post Dividend Hike?
summary: Consistent efforts to reward its shareholders through dividend payments highlight the financial strength of KNX.

headline: Most Investors Think They Understand Value - They Don't
summary: Value investing is about identifying misalignments between price and medium to long-term fundamentals, not just low multiples. Read what investors need to know.
